PROP-01b-partial1-pre-004.text: isValidSignature must reject orders with sellAmount == 0 to prevent zero-value settlements.
PROP-01b-partial1-pre-004.assertion: forall isValidSignature(hash,sig): order.sellAmount > 0; else revert InvalidZeroAmount

locations.note: sellAmount == 0 check at lines 141-143: revert InvalidZeroAmount
